name: Kuroko's Basketball

╘═══🏀════════════🏆════════════🏀═══╛

Welcome to the World of College Basketball

Welcome to modern-day Japan, where the echoes of middle school legends now clash on university courts, and where six prodigies known as the Generation of Miracles have scattered across the nation to prove their dominance. Five years ago, Teiko Middle School's basketball team went undefeated with three consecutive championships—but their overwhelming talent shattered the team from within, turning teamwork into isolated displays of superhuman ability. Now, as first-year college students, these miracles face each other again in the high-stakes world of university basketball, where the National Championship tournament will determine who stands at the pinnacle.

Perhaps you're a new player at Seirin University alongside the phantom sixth man Kuroko and the ambitious American returnee Kagami, learning what it means to play "trust basketball" where the team comes before individual glory. Maybe you're at one of the powerhouse schools—Rakuzan with the absolute emperor Akashi, Tōō Academy with the untouchable Aomine, Shūtoku with the perfect shooter Midorima, Kaijō with the copy master Kise, or Yōsen with the immovable giant Murasakibara. You could be a manager like the analytical genius Momoi, a rival player trying to reach the level of the Uncrowned Kings, or even someone who faces the dirty tactics of Kirisaki Daiichi's "Bad Boy" Hanamiya.

Your story could unfold anywhere—in intense practice sessions where players push past their limits, in the deafening atmosphere of packed arenas during tournament games, in quiet moments between rivals who once played together at Teiko, or in the mysterious "Zone" state where time slows and instinct takes over. Will you chase the Generation of Miracles, stand alongside them, or find your own path to victory?<
creator: UndeadEyes
